TITLE: feat: SAM 3 text-prompt segmentation reusing the DINO review workflow
LABELS: roadmap, type:feat, size:XL, phase:D-sam3
---
## Context

Text-prompted segmentation exists today as a two-stage pipeline: Grounding-DINO turns per-class phrases into boxes, then SAM 2 refines each box into a mask, with a mature review workflow around it (temp-annotation overlay, Enter/Escape accept/reject, batch over all images and slices, auto-accept mode). SAM 3 supports text ("concept") prompting natively, producing masks in one stage — better masks, one model instead of two.

The core design rule of this issue: **SAM 3 results flow through the EXISTING temp-annotation review pipeline. No new review UI.** SAM 3 is a new producer plugged in where "DINO boxes → SAM masks" currently sits; everything downstream (review, accept/reject, batch navigation, auto-accept, persistence) is reused verbatim. Grounding-DINO stays available as a fallback.

## Current state

All file:line references verified on current master.

**Inference layer patterns to mirror** (`src/digitalsreeni_image_annotator/inference/sam_utils.py`):
- `_run_sync(fn, *args)` (lines 244-287): runs a callable on a `_InferenceThread` (184-219) while pumping the caller's event loop (ADR-013); re-raises worker exceptions on the caller; module-level `_inference_in_flight` flag raises `InferenceBusyError` (222) on re-entry; GUI-thread-only tripwire at 262-268.
- Lazy model load (ADR-012): `SAMUtils.change_sam_model` (324-344) resolves the checkpoint, loads on the worker via `_load_model_blocking` (346-355, lazy `from ultralytics import SAM`), and only sets `current_sam_model` after success. Device via `core/torch_utils.py::resolve_torch_device`. `unload()` (368-406) documents the GPU-release recipe.
- `_qimage_to_numpy` (69-109) — reuse it; its `.copy()` discipline is what makes crossing the thread boundary safe.
- Error surfacing at the controller: `SAMController.change_sam_model` (controllers/sam_controller.py:183-207) catches load failures into a QMessageBox and resets the picker to index 0.

**Review pipeline to reuse** (`src/digitalsreeni_image_annotator/controllers/dino_controller.py`):
- `run_dino_detection_single` (192-342): guards (DINO model 193-195, **SAM model 197-202**, image 204-207), builds `class_configs` via `_build_dino_class_configs` (176-188: phrases + per-class box/txt/nms thresholds), DINO `detect`, then `sam_utils.apply_sam_predictions_batch`, then EITHER auto-accept commit (296-321) or attach `temp_annotations` for review (323-342). The auto-accept dropdown (`dino_batch_mode`, ui/sidebar.py:217-220) is honored in the single path too (comment at 292-295).
- `run_dino_detection_batch` (344-451): flattens work via `_collect_dino_batch_work_items` (453-493 — regular images from disk + every loaded slice), per-item detect→SAM, then `_commit_dino_results` (495-538, records undo history per image key at 508) or `_store_dino_batch_results` (540-552) + `_show_dino_batch_review` (554-577).
- `_refresh_dino_temp_for_current` (613-636): re-syncs the single `image_label.temp_annotations` field from `dino_batch_results` on every image/slice switch (called from image_controller.py:353 and 435).
- `accept_dino_results` / `reject_dino_results` (638-680); `DINOReviewEventFilter` (44-79) — note line 73: it only activates when `any(a.get("source") == "dino" for a in temp)`.
- Model picker: `dino_model_selector` built in ui/sidebar.py:153-159, handled by `_on_dino_model_changed` (dino_controller.py:94-130); lazy weight download `_ensure_dino_model_downloaded` (132-163) via `dino_utils.download_model` (inference/dino_utils.py:335).

**Result dict contracts** (what a SAM 3 backend must emit to be a drop-in):
- detection result: `{"class_name": str, "score": float, "bbox": [x1,y1,x2,y2]}` (dino_utils `detect`);
- mask result: `{"segmentation": [x1,y1,x2,y2,...flat polygon], "score": float}` or `{"error": str}` (sam_utils `_mask_to_polygon` at 114-130 shows the mask→polygon conversion to reuse).

## Proposed design

**New file `src/digitalsreeni_image_annotator/inference/sam3_utils.py`** — `SAM3Utils(QObject)`, deliberately parallel to `SAMUtils`/`DINOUtils`:

- Imports `_run_sync`, `_qimage_to_numpy`, `_mask_to_polygon` from `sam_utils` (shared `_inference_in_flight` flag then automatically serialises SAM 3 against SAM 2/DINO — desirable).
- `ensure_loaded()` / `_load_model_blocking(...)`: lazy import + load per the D1 ADR's chosen route (Ultralytics preferred); load on worker thread via `_run_sync`; set a `loaded` marker only after success; provide `download`/availability checking analogous to `_ensure_dino_model_downloaded`; `unload()` copying the `SAMUtils.unload` recipe.
- `detect_text(self, image: QImage, class_configs: list[dict]) -> list[dict] | None`: for each class config (same shape `_build_dino_class_configs` produces: `name`, `phrases`, `box_thr`, `txt_thr`, `nms_thr`), run SAM 3 concept prompting per phrase, filter by the class's confidence threshold (map per the D1 ADR — reuse `box_thr` as the confidence knob; ignore knobs SAM 3 has no equivalent for, documented in a docstring), convert each mask via `_mask_to_polygon`, and return a **combined list**: `{"class_name", "score", "segmentation", "bbox"}` per instance. Returning both `segmentation` and `bbox` lets the controller build the two parallel lists (`results`, `sam_results`) the existing pipeline zips.

**Controller wiring** (modify `controllers/dino_controller.py`; no new controller):

- Add `"SAM 3 (text prompt)"` to `dino_model_selector` (ui/sidebar.py:153-159) and teach `_on_dino_model_changed` its ready/download states.
- New private `_run_text_detection(self, qimage)` used by both workflows: if the selected model is SAM 3 → `mw.sam3_utils.detect_text(qimage, class_configs)` and split each instance into `results`-shaped and `sam_results`-shaped entries; else the existing DINO `detect` + `apply_sam_predictions_batch` two-stage. From there the code paths are IDENTICAL — auto-accept, temp attach, `_commit_dino_results`, `_store_dino_batch_results` all unchanged.
- Guards: when SAM 3 is selected, **skip the "No SAM Model" guard** (197-202 and 349-354) — SAM 3 needs no SAM 2 refinement stage. Keep it for the DINO path.
- `mw.sam3_utils = SAM3Utils()` initialised in `ImageAnnotator.__init__` next to `sam_utils`/`dino_utils` (annotator_window.py:104-112).
- Tag produced temp annotations `"source": "sam3"` and widen the two source checks: `DINOReviewEventFilter` line 73 and any other `== "dino"` comparison found by `grep -rn '"dino"' src/` → membership in `("dino", "sam3")`.
- Status label (`lbl_dino_status`) messages reuse the existing set; thresholds/phrases persistence (`dino_config` in `.iap`, project_controller.py:505-510) works unchanged since the same widgets drive both backends.

## Implementation steps

1. Branch `feature/sam3-text-prompt`. Read the D1 ADR first; if its recommendation is missing or stale, stop and update it rather than improvising.
2. Implement `inference/sam3_utils.py` (load/unload/download + `detect_text`), reusing `_run_sync` / `_qimage_to_numpy` / `_mask_to_polygon` — do not fork them.
3. Unit-test the result-shaping logic with the model call monkeypatched (see Test plan) before any UI wiring.
4. Sidebar entry + `_on_dino_model_changed` states + `sam3_utils` construction on the window.
5. Extract `_run_text_detection` and route `run_dino_detection_single` + `run_dino_detection_batch` through it; adjust the SAM-model guards; verify **auto-accept is honored in BOTH paths** with SAM 3 selected.
6. Widen the `source == "dino"` checks to include `"sam3"`.
7. Add dependency bounds from the D1 ADR to packaging (single source of truth per {{A6}} if merged).
8. Manual golden path (GPU box if available): pick "SAM 3 (text prompt)", phrases on one class, Detect Current Image → review overlay → Enter accepts; Detect All over a project containing a TIFF stack → batch review navigates slices; auto-accept mode commits directly; switch DINO back — two-stage path still works.
9. Update docs, run the senior-reviewer agent, open PR.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] "SAM 3 (text prompt)" appears in the model picker; selecting it enables Detect buttons without requiring a SAM 2 model; weights download lazily on first detect with a clear status message; load failure shows a QMessageBox and resets the picker (mirror sam_controller.py:186-195).
- [ ] Single-image detection with SAM 3 attaches temp annotations reviewable with the existing Enter/Escape flow (event filter fires for `source == "sam3"`).
- [ ] Auto-accept dropdown is honored by BOTH the single and batch SAM 3 paths (commits with `record_history`, refreshes slice colours, auto-saves — same as `_commit_dino_results` today).
- [ ] Batch detection covers regular images AND all loaded slices via `_collect_dino_batch_work_items`; review navigation and per-image `_refresh_dino_temp_for_current` re-sync work unchanged.
- [ ] Grounding-DINO two-stage path is byte-for-byte behaviourally unchanged (regression: existing DINO tests green).
- [ ] UI stays responsive during SAM 3 load and inference (event loop pumps; progress dialog cancel works in batch); re-entrant detect clicks are absorbed by the in-flight guard, never crash.
- [ ] Committed annotations are undoable (Ctrl+Z removes an accepted batch for the current image).
- [ ] Full test suite green.

## Test plan

- `tests/unit/test_sam3_utils.py`: monkeypatch the model call inside `SAM3Utils` to return canned masks (small numpy binary masks); assert `detect_text` output shape (`class_name`/`score`/`segmentation`/`bbox` per instance), threshold filtering (instance below the class's `box_thr` dropped), polygon conversion delegates to `_mask_to_polygon` (mask smaller than the area-10 contour floor yields no instance), and that an unloaded model raises/returns None rather than half-working.
- `tests/integration/test_sam3_workflow.py` — window fixture pattern from `tests/integration/test_image_filter_wiring.py:23-29`; replace `window.sam3_utils` with a stub whose `detect_text` returns two deterministic instances and set the picker to the SAM 3 entry:
  - single detect, review mode → `image_label.temp_annotations` has 2 entries with `source == "sam3"`; `accept_dino_results()` commits them into `all_annotations` and clears the field;
  - single detect with `dino_batch_mode` = "Auto-accept all detections" → committed directly, `temp_annotations` empty (the "single path honors auto-accept" regression);
  - batch over one regular image + one in-memory fake slice project → `dino_batch_results` keyed per image/slice; simulated image switch calls `_refresh_dino_temp_for_current` and swaps the temp set (the "masks bleed" regression);
  - DINO selected → stub NOT called, legacy path untouched (assert via call spy).
- Regression: `pytest tests/integration/test_smoke.py -v` (includes the AST inline-import gate, ADR-016 — relevant because sam3_utils will use function-body lazy imports).
- Run: `pytest tests/unit/test_sam3_utils.py tests/integration/test_sam3_workflow.py tests/integration/test_smoke.py -v`, then `pytest tests/ -v`.
- Manual (cannot be mocked): real model load end-to-end per the CLAUDE.md inference checklist — "verify the model loads end-to-end (no silent load failure), returns masks/boxes, and the UI stays responsive during inference".

## Docs to update

- `docs/09_architecture_decisions.md` — flip the D1 draft ADR from Proposed to **Accepted**, amending it with what actually shipped; if the review-pipeline-reuse decision deserves its own record, take the next free ADR number (verify the file's current max — 030/031 will likely be taken by C1/D1).
- `docs/05_building_block_view.md` — add `SAM3Utils`; note DINOController's dual-backend role.
- `docs/06_runtime_view.md` — update the text-prompt detection workflow (one-stage vs two-stage branch).
- `docs/08_crosscutting_concepts.md` — extend the "DINO Temp Annotations" section: sources are now `dino` and `sam3`; the single-field re-sync rule applies to both.
- CLAUDE.md — delete this issue's backlog row in the same PR if present.

## Pitfalls & guardrails

- **DINO review state** (CLAUDE.md, verbatim): "`image_label.temp_annotations` is a single field, **not** per-image — must be re-synced from `dino_batch_results` on every image/slice switch via `_refresh_dino_temp_for_current`. Otherwise the first image's masks bleed onto every subsequent slice." SAM 3 batch results MUST land in `dino_batch_results`, not a new dict.
- **Auto-accept dropdown** (verbatim): "Honored by **both** `run_dino_detection_single` and `run_dino_detection_batch` — easy to forget in the single path because the combo is labeled 'batch'."
- **DINO batch over stacks** (verbatim): "Use `_collect_dino_batch_work_items()` to flatten regular images + every loaded slice; don't iterate `self.all_images` directly."
- **In-flight guard (ADR-013)**: route ALL SAM 3 calls through `_run_sync`; never call the model directly on the GUI thread and never from a non-GUI thread (tripwire at sam_utils.py:262-268). Catch `InferenceBusyError` and skip, as `SAMController.apply_sam_prediction` does (sam_controller.py:111-117).
- **Event filter source check** (dino_controller.py:73): forgetting to widen `a.get("source") == "dino"` makes Enter/Escape dead for SAM 3 reviews — an easy-to-miss, manual-only failure. Test asserts the accept path instead of the raw key event, so ALSO verify Enter manually.
- **Model-picker failure handling**: only mark SAM 3 ready after a successful load; on failure reset the combo to index 0 (pattern: sam_controller.py:186-195). Never leave `loaded=True` with `_model=None` — that's the silent-None class of bug the testing checklist calls out.
- **GPU memory**: loading SAM 3 alongside SAM 2 + DINO can OOM an 8 GB card. Reuse the `unload()` recipe (sam_utils.py:368-406) and consider prompting to unload SAM 2 when SAM 3 is selected; at minimum document coexistence cost in the status label/tooltip.
- **Undo**: every commit path must call `annotation_controller.record_history(image_name)` BEFORE mutating (as `_commit_dino_results` does at dino_controller.py:508) — you get this for free by reusing `_commit_dino_results`; don't write a parallel commit.

## Dependencies

- Blocked by {{D1}} (integration route, API names, versions, license — all cited by this design).
- Recommended, not blocking: {{A5}} (DINOController workflow tests give the reuse-heavy paths a safety net before they are refactored into `_run_text_detection`).
- Blocks: {{D3}}.

_Workflow: follow CLAUDE.md — feature branch, run smoke tests (`pytest tests/integration/test_smoke.py -v`), update arc42 docs, run the senior-reviewer agent before the PR._
